titleStmt.title: SII 34.40: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 40. Tiruppanandāḷ, Kumbakonam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Arjunajaṭēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga III, 8th year, Makara, sudi. 2, Wednesday, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1185, December 25 Wednesday.

Built in at the beginning. Gift of land for offerings to the images of Tirukkaḍavūr Kuṅgiliyakkalaiya-Nāyaṉār and other Śaiva saints set up in the temple at Tiruppanandāḷ, by a devotee of the temple, called Tīyilum-piriyātāṉ Aḻiyāviradamkoṇḍāṉ alias Kuṅgiliyakkalaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṉacakkaravaṟttikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka cōḻa tēvarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu ditiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattu nāḷ virutarāja payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇi nāṭṭut tirupparantāḷ
Īcuparamuṭaiyāraicevvē Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tirukkaṭavūr kuṅkiliyakkalaiyar cīpātattukkup paṇiceytirukkum tīyilum piriyātāṉ Aḻiyāviratam koṇṭāṉāṉa kuṅkuliyak kalaiyanēṉ tāṉappiramāṇam Eṅkaḷukku Ārmārttamākap pūjai
ṉārkkun tiruvēṭavemperumāḷukkum maṟṟuḷḷa tēvakaḷukkun tiruppaṭi māṟṟukkuṭalāka śrīpātattu nīrvārttuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruttā ṭakai Īcuramuṭaiyār tēvatāṉam rājēntiracōḻa nallūril kīḻvāykkāṟ kaṇṭattu Eṅkaḷukkuk kiramāketamāṉa Iṟaiyili(yā)yāṉa kāṇi
Innilam Oruvēliyum Innāyaṉmārkku kāṇi Iṟaimikutiyā luḷḷutum Iṟaiyiliyā luḷḷutum tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkuṭalāka śrīpātattu nīrvārttuk kuṭuttēn tīyilum piriyātāṉ Aḻiyāvirataṅkoṇṭāṉāṉa kuṅkuliyakkalaiyanēṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai tīyilum piriyātāṉ Aḻi
ṉakuṅkuliyakkalaiyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻiyāvirataṅkoṇṭāṉ tīyilu piriyātāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ cīruṭaikkaḻaleḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kīḻaiyiluṭaiyāṉ tiruparantāḷu ṭaiyānēn Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Ātaṉuṭaiyāṉēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ Uṭaiyāraip pūjikkum tiruciṟ
Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ nāṟppatteṇṇāyira paṭṭanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ parantāḷuṭaiyāṉ piriyātānēn Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ cīpātan tāṅkuvaṟ kuc cāmutāyam vītiviṭaṅkappiccanēṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ tirupparantāḷ tāṉiuṭaiya sarvakkirutu nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉēṉan §
Digital edition of SII 34.40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
